title: 10 best herbal capsules for phlegm
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for phlegm are dietary supplements that contain a blend of natural herbs and plant extracts, which help to reduce the production of phlegm and support respiratory health. These capsules typically include herbs such as licorice root, marshmallow root, and slippery elm, which have been used for centuries in traditional medicine to soothe irritated throats and reduce inflammation. By taking herbal capsules for phlegm, individuals can alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, and improve their overall quality of life. For example, a person who suffers from chronic bronchitis may find relief by taking herbal capsules for phlegm, which can help to reduce the frequency and severity of coughing fits and improve breathing. As a result, they may be able to engage in daily activities more easily and experience a greater sense of well-being.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsule helps with phlegm because it contains a substance called mucilage, which can soothe irritated mucous membranes and reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract. This action can help to loosen and expel phlegm, making it easier to cough up and clear out of the lungs. Additionally, marshmallow has expectorant properties, which can help to thin and break up mucus, further supporting the body's natural ability to eliminate phlegm. Marshmallow capsules may also help to reduce the frequency and severity of coughing fits, providing relief for individuals with respiratory conditions such as bronchitis, pneumonia, or chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
remedy_properties: Demulcent: Marshmallow capsules contain mucilage that coats and soothes irritated mucous membranes, providing relief from excessive phlegm production.
Expectorant: The high mucilage content of marshmallow capsules helps to loosen and expel phlegm from the respiratory tract, making it easier to expel.

Anti-inflammatory: Marshmallow capsules contain active constituents like flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory properties, reducing inflammation in the respiratory tract and alleviating symptoms of phlegm.
Antitussive: Marshmallow capsules contain mucilage that forms a protective layer over the respiratory tract, suppressing cough and reducing the production of phlegm.

Antimicrobial: Marshmallow capsules contain active constituents like tannins that have antimicrobial properties, helping to prevent the growth of bacteria and viruses that can cause respiratory infections and phlegm.
